return `
${h.ket || h.kat}
${h.tgl ? new Date(h.tgl).toLocaleString('id-ID') : '-'}
${amtSign}${formatRp(h.amt)}
`; }).join('') || '

Data tidak ditemukan

'; } function renderKasbon() { document.getElementById('listKasbon').innerHTML = data.kasbon.map(k => `
${k.nama}
${k.tgl}
-${formatRp(k.nominal)}
`).join(''); } function renderKontak() { document.getElementById('listKontak').innerHTML = data.kontak.map(k => `
${k.nama}
${k.wa || '-'}
${k.catatan && k.catatan !== '-' ? `
📝 ${k.catatan}
` : ''}
`).join(''); } window.bukaHalaman = (id) => { // Sembunyikan semua view & modal document.querySelectorAll('.page-view').forEach(p => p.style.display = 'none'); document.getElementById('view-beranda').style.display = (id === 'view-beranda') ? 'block' : 'none'; // Tampilkan halaman target if(id !== 'view-beranda') { document.getElementById(id).style.display = 'block'; } // Update Bottom Nav Active State document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(item => { item.classList.remove('active'); if (item.onclick && item.onclick.toString().includes(id)) { item.classList.add('active'); } }); tutupSemuaModal(); }; window.bukaRiwayat = () => { renderRiwayat(); bukaHalaman('view-riwayat'); }; window.bukaLaporan = () => { renderLaporan(); bukaHalaman('view-laporan'); }; window.bukaRincianBank = () => { // Memfilter riwayat yang merupakan DEPOSIT ke 'bank' atau transaksi yang menambah saldo bank (Bank In) const filtered = data.history.filter(h => (h.kat === 'DEPOSIT' && h.ket.toLowerCase().includes('bank')) || (data.profile.categories.find(c => c.name === h.kat)?.role === 'bank_in') ); document.getElementById('listRincianBank').innerHTML = filtered.length ? filtered.map(h => `
${h.ket}
${new Date(h.tgl).toLocaleString('id-ID')}
+${formatRp(h.amt)}
`).join('') : '

Belum ada riwayat penambahan saldo bank

'; bukaModal('modalRincianBank'); }; window.bukaRincianKas = () => { const totalKas = data.sales + data.admin + data.acc - data.tarik; document.getElementById('kontenRincianKas').innerHTML = `
Saldo Kas Tunai Saat Ini
${formatRp(totalKas)}
Jumlah Penjualan (Digital) + ${formatRp(data.sales)}
Laba Admin + ${formatRp(data.admin)}
Laba Acc (Aksesoris) + ${formatRp(data.acc)}
Tarik Tunai - ${formatRp(data.tarik)}
* Rumus: Sales + Admin + Acc - Tarik Tunai
`; bukaModal('modalRincianKas'); }; window.bukaLaporan = () => { const stats = {}; data.history.forEach(h => { if(!stats[h.kat]) stats[h.kat] = { count: 0, total: 0 }; stats[h.kat].count++; stats[h.kat].total += h.amt; }); const kasAkhir = data.sales + data.admin + data.acc - data.tarik; document.getElementById('kontenLaporan').innerHTML = `
Total Kas Tunai (All-Time)
${formatRp(kasAkhir)}
RINGKASAN AKUMULASI
Total Sales (Bank) ${formatRp(data.sales)}
Total Laba Admin +${formatRp(data.admin)}
Total Laba Acc +${formatRp(data.acc)}
Total Tarik Tunai -${formatRp(data.tarik)}
AKTIVITAS (100 TERAKHIR)
${Object.keys(stats).map(k => `
${k} (${stats[k].count}x) ${formatRp(stats[k].total)}
`).join('')}
`; }; function renderLaporan() { window.bukaLaporan(); } window.exportPDF = async (type) => { const element = document.createElement('div'); element.style.padding = '30px'; element.style.background = 'white'; element.style.color = 'black'; element.style.fontFamily = 'Plus Jakarta Sans, sans-serif'; const logoUrl = document.getElementById('headerLogo').src; const toko = data.profile.toko || 'KINK'; const date = new Date().toLocaleDateString('id-ID', { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' }); element.innerHTML = `

${toko}

Laporan Keuangan & Riwayat Transaksi

${date}

${document.getElementById('kontenLaporan').innerHTML}

Daftar Riwayat

${data.history.map(h => `
${h.ket}
${new Date(h.tgl).toLocaleString('id-ID')}
+Rp ${h.amt.toLocaleString('id-ID')}
`).join('')}
Dicetak otomatis oleh Sistem Kasir KINK
`; const opt = { margin: 10, filename: `Laporan_KINK_${new Date().getTime()}.pdf`, image: { type: 'jpeg', quality: 0.98 }, html2canvas: { scale: 2 }, jsPDF: { unit: 'mm', format: 'a4', orientation: 'portrait' } }; if (type === 'download') { html2pdf().set(opt).from(element).save(); } else if (type === 'share') { const pdfBlob = await html2pdf().set(opt).from(element).outputBlob(); const file = new File([pdfBlob], opt.filename, { type: 'application/pdf' }); if (navigator.canShare && navigator.canShare({ files: [file] })) { try { await navigator.share({ files: [file], title: 'Laporan KINK', text: 'Berikut adalah laporan keuangan Kasir KINK.' }); } catch (err) { console.log('Share canceled', err); } } else { alert("Browser tidak mendukung berbagi file langsung. File akan di-download."); html2pdf().set(opt).from(element).save(); } } }; setInterval(() => { const now = new Date(); document.getElementById('jam').innerText = now.toLocaleTimeString('id-ID'); const options = { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' }; document.getElementById('fullDate').innerText = now.toLocaleDateString('id-ID', options); }, 1000);
